pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly mandate and check for this file path.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly mandate and check for this file path.
Task description specifies a 60-second global timer, and verifier.py checks for this 60s threshold.
Task description requires 100 rows in the conditions file, and verifier.py checks for len(rows) >= 100.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to generate an experiment file at `/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/letter_comparison/letter_comparison.psyexp` and a conditions file at `/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/letter_comparison/conditions.csv`. The experiment must enforce a 60-second global time limit and the conditions file must contain at least 100 trials.
